services/driver-service/tests/**/*.py: bash -c 'cd services/driver-service && uv run --with pytest pytest tests/'
services/conflict-detection-service/test: bash -c 'cd services/conflict-detection-service && uv run --with pytest pytest tests/'
services/routes-service/tests/**/*.py: bash -c 'cd services/routes-service && uv run --with pytest pytest tests/'
